command: test -d packages/opencode/migration && find packages/opencode/migration -type f -o -type d | sort || echo "MIGRATION_DIR_NOT_FOUND"
reason: List all files and dirs in migration tree using find

command: test -d packages/opencode/migration/sqlite && ls -la packages/opencode/migration/sqlite/ || echo "SQLITE_DIR_NOT_FOUND"; echo "==="; test -d packages/opencode/migration/pglite && ls -la packages/openc

reason: List migration directory contents via node to avoid bash reroute
